Bash(cd C:/Antigravity/PoliMirror && python -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('shugiin_raw.html', 'rb'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)
text = raw.decode\('cp932', errors='replace'\)
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup\(text, 'lxml'\)
tables = soup.find_all\('table'\)
t = tables[1]
rows = t.find_all\('tr'\)
for i in range\(2, 6\):
    cells = rows[i].find_all\('td'\)
    texts = [c.get_text\(strip=True\) for c in cells]
    print\(f'Row {i}: {texts}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(cd C:/Antigravity/PoliMirror && pip install lxml 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(cd C:/Antigravity/PoliMirror && curl -s -L -o sangiin_raw.html "https://www.sangiin.go.jp/japanese/joho1/kousei/giin/216/giin.htm" && python -c "
import sys, re
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('sangiin_raw.html', 'rb'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)
meta = re.search\(rb'charset[=\\s]*[\\"]*\([^\\s\\">;]+\)', raw[:3000]\)
print\('Meta charset:', meta.group\(1\) if meta else 'not found'\)
print\(f'Size: {len\(raw\)} bytes'\)
for enc in ['utf-8', 'shift_jis', 'euc-jp']:
    try:
        text = raw.decode\(enc\)
        print\(f'{enc}: OK'\)
    except:
        print\(f'{enc}: FAIL'\)
")
